title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Volkswagen India Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Volkswagen India Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
